contexts.context: "You, Messer <mark>Niccolo</mark>, gifted as you are with a milder nature...
...and fly from temptation." Saying these words, <mark>Niccolo</mark> Capponi followed Jacopo Guicciardini.
"You, Messer <mark>Niccolo</mark>, gifted as you are with a milder nature...
...and fly from temptation." Saying these words, <mark>Niccolo</mark> Capponi followed Jacopo Guicciardini.
...not able to solidify and retain it, thus inspiring <mark>Niccolo</mark> Machiavelli to write The Prince. [ZP]...
